understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate a tile-based level by moving horizontally and using gravity to fall, ultimately reaching the goal gem tile '+' while avoiding spike tiles and strategically removing breakable blocks with clicks.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only: MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT, after which the character falls in the current gravity direction until landing on a safe tile, hitting a spike (instant loss), or reaching the goal. CLICK targets a tile at a specified [x,y] coordinate and removes breakable blocks ('x') to open paths. UNDO reverses the last action. The game provides structured previews of landing positions and corridor scans to anticipate fall destinations. Later levels may include a rising platform where horizontal moves count down toward an instant kill. Each level allows 2 attempts of up to 50 turns.
